mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM retail_order WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO retail_order (id, code, customer_email, status, total_amount, currency, version, placed_at, shipped_at) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.code}, #{row.customerEmail}, #{row.status}, #{row.totalAmount}, #{row.currency}, #{row.version}, #{row.placedAt}, #{row.shippedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE retail_order SET code = #{row.code}, customer_email = #{row.customerEmail}, status = #{row.status}, total_amount = #{row.totalAmount}, currency = #{row.currency}, version = #{row.version}, shipped_at = #{row.shippedAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{row.id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM retail_order WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, line_no, sku_code, location_id, quantity, unit_price FROM retail_order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY line_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO retail_order_item (order_id, line_no, sku_code, location_id, quantity, unit_price) VALUES (#{row.orderId}, #{row.lineNo}, #{row.skuCode}, #{row.locationId}, #{row.quantity}, #{row.unitPrice})
